header.title: A technical and legal team devoted to corporate management
header.description: Sttok was born from a team with technical and legal backgrounds, united by a simple idea: corporate management deserves the same excellence as any other critical area of the company. From that standard came the leading corporate management platform in the Spanish-speaking market.

body: Sttok has grown remarkably because of the value it brings to large companies, where keeping the shareholder base and corporate records right is critical: an up-to-date registry, meetings with full guarantees and impeccable documentation.

Today more than 250 companies — from centuries-old groups like Osborne or Caballero 1830 to companies like AXA, Factorial, Multiverse Computing or PLD Space — manage over €20,000 million in equity and 250,000 shareholders with Sttok.
We work to the standards their legal and security teams demand: ISO 27001 certification audited by Bureau Veritas, GDPR compliance and data hosted and encrypted in Europe.

values.title: Legal rigor
values.description: The product is designed by people who have managed companies: every feature respects how corporate law actually works.

values.title: Technical excellence
values.description: A robust, market-standard platform, with the security and integrations a demanding IT team expects.

values.title: Exact data
values.description: The shareholder registry is the source of truth: percentages, dilutions and quorums are always calculated on real data.
